---
name: Spec question
about: Ask about language semantics or report a spec ambiguity
title: '[spec] '
labels: spec
assignees: ''
---

## Spec Section

Which section of `spec/sections/` does this concern? (Link or path.)

## Question or Ambiguity

State the question clearly. If it's an ambiguity, quote the spec
text and explain the two (or more) reasonable readings.

## Example

A small `.bock` snippet that exercises the unclear behavior:

```bock
// example
```

## Compiler Behavior (if applicable)

What does the current compiler do with this example? Does it agree
with your reading, the alternative, or something else?

## Expected Resolution

- [ ] Spec clarification (reword existing text)
- [ ] Spec change (alter the rule)
- [ ] Implementation fix (compiler diverges from spec)
- [ ] Just a question, no change needed
